name: Australian Central Western Time
dstRules: Unofficially observes DST (+09:45 in summer); not recognized by Australian federal law
description: One of the world's rarest time zones, used by a tiny community along the Western Australia–South Australia border near Eucla. With only a few hundred residents, this 45-minute offset zone is an unofficial compromise between Perth (UTC+8) and Adelaide (UTC+9:30).
